[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1100100000 3
2 1000101001 4
3 0010000100 2
4 0010101100 4
5 0010010000 2
6 0000010100 2
7 1001101001 5
